name_en: 🆕 【Top-tier Original】N61700 Gold buckle 👏👏 Soft yet functional style, this small Victorine wallet is an excellent choice for everyday carry. The iconic Monogram canvas is paired with colorful leather lining for a stylish look, while the highly practical design ensures secure storage and easy access for credit cards and personal items. Dimensions: 12x9cm, Packaging: With box, 🎁
